reviews.comment:
Restaurante mala la comida y atención no recomiendo aca

(Translated by Google)
The food and service at this restaurant were bad; I don't recommend it.

reviews.comment:
La estación bien en la atención, pero el puesto de ventas de embutidos, el costo y el lugar lamentable

(Translated by Google)
The station is good in terms of service, but the sausage stand, the cost and the location are pitiful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOMTh5OTBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estacionamos bajo los árboles, tomamos mate, las chicas compraron en el autoservicio frutas y jugos naturales.sandwich de miga, papitas, etc. Un lugar muy lindo.

(Translated by Google)
We parked under the trees, drank mate, and the girls bought fruit and natural juices at the self-service counter, a sandwich with crumbs, chips, etc. A very nice place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNONTRPN0tREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, solo cargue combustible y me hubiera gustado solo q me limpien los vidrios, no te ofrecen de limpiarlos, no quise hacerlo yo ya que siempre me ofrecen en casi todas, si me ofreció aceite para el coche y agua para completar, pero faltó ese detalle . No baje al shop, no baje del auto xq había muchísimos mosquitos.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, I only filled up with gas and I would have liked them to clean the windows. They didn't offer to clean them, and I didn't want to do it myself since they always offer it at almost every station. They did offer me oil and water to top up the tank, but that was a nice touch. I didn't go into the shop, and I didn't get out of the car because there were so many mosquitoes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNObTdmYmFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo oasis en la ruta 2 para descansar un poco, comer y seguir. Me queda justo a mitad de camino.

(Translated by Google)
A lovely oasis on Route 2, perfect for a short rest, a bite to eat, and then continuing on. It's right in the middle of my journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOcTYyNUpnEAE
